form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP.FILTRAR.form

form:DateTime.name: fecha_i_desde
form:DateTime.descr: Fecha de Inicio del Horario para una Persona

form:DateTime.name: fecha_i_hasta
form:DateTime.descr: Fecha de Inicio del Horario para una Persona

form:DateTime.name: fecha_e_desde
form:DateTime.descr: Fecha de Inicio del Horario para una Persona

form:DateTime.name: fecha_e_hasta
form:DateTime.descr: Fecha de Inicio del Horario para una Persona

form:Resource.declare: <PARAM where="LEG.oi_empresa=1 AND LEG.oi_indic_activo=1 AND LEG.l_confidencial=0 AND LEG.oi_categoria_ult not in ( select F0.oi_categoria FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as F0 WHERE F0.oi_convenio in (1,3) ) AND LEG.oi_categoria_ult not in (5,3) AND LEG.oi_puesto_ult not in (101,103) AND LEG.oi_posicion_ult not in (4,7) AND LEG.oi_posicion_ult not in ( select F1.oi_posicion FROM ORG04_POSICIONES as F1 WHERE F1.oi_departamento=1) AND LEG.oi_posicion_ult not in ( select F2.oi_posicion FROM ORG04_POSICIONES as F2 WHERE F2.oi_sector=1) AND LEG.oi_ctro_costo_ult not in ( select F3.oi_centro_costo FROM ORG08_CS_COSTO as F3 WHERE F3.oi_grupo_ccosto in (1,2) ) AND LEG.oi_ctro_costo_ult not in (3,8) AND LEG.oi_tipo_personal not in (1,2) AND LEG.oi_contrato not in (1,3) AND LEG.oi_forma_pago not in (1,3) AND LEG.oi_forma_pago!=1 AND LEG.oi_sindicato not in (1,2) AND LEG.oi_ubicacion!=1" />
form:Resource.name: qry_debug

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT count(LEG.oi_personal_emp) as TOT from PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG JOIN PER.oi_personal inner LEG.oi_personal {%? ($PARAM/@where != "") {% WHERE {%=$PARAM/@where %} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_convenio as id, T.c_convenio as COD, T.d_convenio as DES FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as T WHERE T.oi_convenio IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_categoria, P.c_convenio, P.d_convenio, T.c_categoria, T.d_categoria FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as P, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as T JOIN P.oi_convenio INNER T.oi_convenio WHERE T.oi_categoria IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_puesto as id, T.c_puesto as COD, T.d_puesto as DES FROM ORG04_PUESTOS as T WHERE T.oi_puesto IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_posicion, P.c_puesto, P.d_puesto, T.c_posicion, T.d_posicion FROM ORG04_PUESTOS as P, ORG04_POSICIONES as T JOIN P.oi_puesto INNER T.oi_puesto WHERE T.oi_posicion IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_departamento as id, T.c_departamento as COD, T.d_departamento as DES FROM ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS as T WHERE T.oi_departamento IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_sector, P.c_departamento, P.d_departamento, T.c_sector, T.d_sector FROM ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS as P, ORG51_SECTORES as T JOIN P.oi_departamento INNER T.oi_departamento WHERE T.oi_sector IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_grupo_ccosto as id, T.c_grupo_ccosto as COD, T.d_grupo_ccosto as DES FROM ORG09_GR_CCOSTO as T WHERE T.oi_grupo_ccosto IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_centro_costo, P.c_grupo_ccosto, P.d_grupo_ccosto, T.c_centro_costo, T.d_centro_costo FROM ORG09_GR_CCOSTO as P, ORG08_CS_COSTO as T JOIN T.oi_grupo_ccosto LEFT OUTER P.oi_grupo_ccosto WHERE T.oi_centro_costo IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_tipo_personal as id, T.c_tipo_personal as COD, T.d_tipo_personal as DES FROM PER11_TIPOS_PERS as T WHERE T.oi_tipo_personal IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_personal_emp as id, T.e_numero_legajo as COD, E.d_ape_y_nom as DES FROM PER01_PERSONAL as E, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as T JOIN E.oi_personal inner T.oi_personal WHERE T.oi_personal_emp IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_contrato as id, T.c_contrato as COD, T.d_contrato as DES FROM PER28_CONTRATOS as T WHERE T.oi_contrato IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_forma_pago as id, T.c_forma_pago as COD, T.d_forma_pago as DES FROM PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as T WHERE T.oi_forma_pago IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_funcion as id, T.c_funcion as COD, T.d_funcion as DES FROM ORG03_FUNCIONES as T WHERE T.oi_funcion IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_sindicato as id, T.c_sindicato as COD, T.d_sindicato as DES FROM PER30_SINDICATOS as T WHERE T.oi_sindicato IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_ubicacion as id, T.c_ubicacion as COD, T.d_ubicacion as DES FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES as T WHERE T.oi_ubicacion IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_estructura as id, O.c_unidad_org as COD, O.d_unidad_org as DES FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as T, ORG01_UNI_ORG as O JOIN T.oi_unidad_org inner O.oi_unidad_org WHERE T.oi_estructura IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW
